query: ("cool roof" OR "green roof" OR "living roof" OR "vegetated roof" OR "reflective roof" OR "white roof" OR "cool roofing" OR "green infrastructure") AND ("urban heat island" OR "UHI" OR "temperature regulation" OR "thermal comfort" OR "heat exposure" OR "ambient temperature" OR "microclimate" OR "heat-related illness" OR "heat stress" OR "thermal environment" OR "heat wave") AND ("cardiovascular" OR "respiratory" OR "morbidity" OR "mortality" OR "health outcomes" OR "health effects" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "heat-related morbidity" OR "cardiovascular disease" OR "respiratory disease" OR "hospital admission" OR "emergency department" OR "natural experiment" OR "randomized controlled trial" OR "RCT" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "causal inference" OR "evaluation" OR "intervention")
